title: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash now available as a Databricks-hosted model
body:
Model Serving now supports Google [Gemini 3.5 Flash](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#gemini-3-5-flash) as a Databricks-hosted model. You can access this model using [Foundation Model APIs](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis).

Customers are responsible for ensuring their compliance with [applicable terms](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/acceptable-use-models).
